name: shellishack--pulse-app-skill
description: Use this skill to help developers get started building Pulse Apps — full-stack React extensions for Pulse Editor that use Module Federation. Trigger when a user asks to: - Create or scaffold a new Pulse App - Understand Pulse App architecture (frontend, backend, skills) - Add server functions or skills to an existing Pulse App - Configure pulse.config.ts or understand app metadata - Use @pulse-editor/react-api hooks (useLoading, useActionEffect) - Develop, preview, or build a Pulse App DO NOT trigger for general React or TypeScript questions unrelated to Pulse Apps.
